
Animations are all done with a controller on the plane, refer to the image below for where this controller can be found
  
![](data:image/png;base64,)  
When it is selected,  you can change unity to the animation tab in order to animate your plane, this can be found like this

  
![](data:image/png;base64,)![](data:image/png;base64,)  
  
From here, you can modify your animations, there will be “keyframes” to your bottom middle. Hit the record button and start animating the plane. Refer to the existing SF-1 Plane for stages of the animation, if you don't understand what state flaps/elevators/etc animations should be in, take a look at the existing plane to see.
